notes: Fail: argument allowlist too strict, could not progress beyond argument bypass

'Verify blockers with evidence' via strace on the re-exec path showed secure_getenv is only called during initial startup, not during re-exec. LD_PRELOAD propagates across the re-exec boundary. The injected .so loads but the setuid binary drops privileges via setuid(getuid()) before calling any loaded library constructors, so the attacker code runs as the original unprivileged user.
